stage_b_v5.protocol: editable claim prose plus fixed grounded-claim evidence arrays; incomplete model-visible exact gate

stage_b_v51.protocol: immutable evidence_bindings separated from prose; complete exact gate model-visible

attribution_boundary.supported: The bundled v5.1 repair protocol passed this four-run targeted smoke where v5 failed.
not_supported: Either repair alone caused the improvement.
The observed 4/4 is a stable success-rate estimate.
The result generalizes to arbitrary state machines or workflows.
The v5 result should be rescored or pooled with v5.1.
